title: turbine operation
description: Operation block of a credo-pure gas-phase turbine (expander).  Hardware-only: specify the shaft power W_shaft (W or kW, NEGATIVE because work is extracted) and the isentropic efficiency eta.  The discharge pressure P_out, the discharge temperature T_out and the expansion ratio are RESULTS.  For 'I need to exhaust at X bar' wrap the unit in a DesignSpec that manipulates $W_shaft with a target on this unit's P_out KPI.

W_shaft.title: Shaft power (hardware, extracted)
W_shaft.description: Mechanical power extracted from the gas.  NEGATIVE (work leaves the fluid).  Use a compressor block for compression.

eta.title: Isentropic efficiency
eta.description: Machine characteristic: w_real / w_isentropic.  0 < eta <= 1.  Lower eta means less of the available expansion work is captured (the rest stays as heat in the exhaust).
